pending.title: World DUMPS $82B US Treasuries - America Must Refinance $10T, No One Buying
pending.description:
The world has always assumed one thing: When crisis hits, money flows into US Treasuries. That assumption just broke.

💸 Sudden shift: Foreign central banks cut holdings at the Federal Reserve Bank of New York by $82B in a month—the fastest pace in over a decade
🛢️ War trigger: Disruption around the Strait of Hormuz forced oil-importing nations to liquidate Treasuries for dollars
🌍 Structural trend: Reserve managers were already diversifying away—this wasn’t the cause, it was the catalyst
📉 Safe

processed.title: John Mearsheimer: Iran Holds All the Cards - The Strategic Defeat of the U.S.
processed.description: Professor John Mearsheimer explains why Iran holds all the cards and can inflict devastating damage on the US and the global economy. The US defeat in Iran will also lead to a much more extensive strategic defeat of American positions in the international system.

processed.title: Trump's 'Victory' BACKFIRED - Declared Inflation Defeated, Now WORST in G7, 66 Days Later
processed.description:
Inflation wasn’t defeated. It was interrupted—then reignited by a shock the system couldn’t absorb.

📉 False peak: In January, OECD data showed US inflation stabilizing near target levels, validating a temporary sense of control
🔥 War trigger: The February escalation around the Strait of Hormuz removed a critical share of global oil supply from accessible markets
⛽ Energy shock: Oil surging above $100 cascaded through transport, food, and manufacturing—embedding inflation across the economy
🏷️ T
